calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-03-2018 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Jul-19-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Judge: Kathleen Kelly; Clerk: J. Bertelsen; Reporter: Mitch Lyon, CSR#6840. (514)

William Ocken, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, Steadfast Insurance Company.
No appearance by defaulted defendant Zetian Systems West, Inc., a California Corporation.
Default of Defendant has been duly entered.
Witness: Andrew Thompson sworn and examined on behalf of Plaintiff.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant as follows:

$14,750,000.00 for breach of contract
$1,378,015.00 for Pre-Judgment Interest, to date (10% per annum)
$7,245.00 for attorney's fees, to date
$949.71 per memorandum of costs (pre-Judgment)
$16,136,209.71 Total Judgment
Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-11-2018 Set For Order To Show Cause On Aug-07-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-09-2018 Continued To May-30-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-28-2017 Continued To Feb-28-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
